title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: clusterRelativePathSegments handling of non-/clusters/ paths could benefit from a clarifying comment explaining the segment layout.
IsKubernetesResourceAPIPath && IsAuthBypassURL cleanly separates two orthogonal concerns.
Segment-based parsing eliminates false positives for resources named 'version' or 'healthz'.
kubernetesResourceAPIPathIndex extracted as shared helper, removing duplicated index-detection logic.
Comprehensive test coverage for both proxied and direct API path formats.
